feedback.text: Hello and first of all let me say how happy I am to see such a initiative and to get a chance to look upon it, and comment about it. Such things are what makes me proud to be part of the european union. While I fully support such an initiative I would also like to see it extended to video games as they fall under the digital sphere. What we need is to come together, developers publishers and consumers and find a middleground where everyone can walk away with a good deal, and in my opinion the Digital Fairness Act can help us with that.
